positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic forest creature, blending elements of a deer, a fox, and ancient forest energy. The creature is depicted in a clean silhouette style with delicate glowing ethereal markings (luminescent blue and emerald green accents) contrasting against a solid, dark forest background. Focus on strong lines and symmetry. The composition should be centered, with the creature facing the viewer, making it perfect for chest placement on apparel. Style: Nordic art influences, geometric vector art, detailed line work, high contrast, poster design. Color palette: deep forest greens, slate gray, glowing cyan, black. Lighting: Dramatic spotlighting emphasizing the glow and edges. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, highly scalable and print-friendly.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, low resolution, grain, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, realistic photo, grainy, dirty, smudged
